title: seriphidium palmeri
intro: Seriphidium palmeri, also known as Palmer's sage or Bigelow's sage, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This shrubby perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Seriphidium palmeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Seriphidium palmeri include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
